productName: Hybrid - Ice Cream Cake Bubble Hash Banger 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Ice Cream Cake supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, butter, and pepper, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
